issues.description: The core new feature — successful fallback from the first URL (vet-registry.vet.host.imbue.com) to the second URL (GitHub raw) when the first fails — is not tested. The existing `test_update_remote_registry_cache_raises_on_network_error` only checks that all URLs failing raises an exception (which was true before this diff too, just for a single URL). There is no test verifying that when the first URL raises a network error but the second URL succeeds, the function completes successfully and the data from the second URL is returned and cached.
